Accounts Payable module. Owns tenant-scoped vendors, bills, bill line items, bill payments, payment applications, recurring bill templates, and AP aging. Money uses integer cents. Bill approval and accounting posting are separate: markBillPayable approves, postBillToAccounting posts approved unpaid bills. voidBill only voids unpaid, unposted bills. voidBillPayment restores applied bill balances and requires an accounting reversal hook for journaled payments. Integrates with accounting-core through the exported AccountingPoster port shape, not internal imports.
